supplements.notes: Contains B12 plus other B vitamins
Only if blood tests show anemia

lifestyle: 🚭 **No smoking:** Smoking reduces B12 absorption by 30-40%
🍺 **Limit alcohol:** <2 drinks/day, alcohol impairs B12 utilization
💊 **Medication review:** Discuss PPIs, metformin with doctor
🏃 **Regular exercise:** Improves circulation and nutrient absorption
medical: 🩸 **Blood tests:** Complete blood count (CBC), folate, iron studies
💉 **Injection option:** Hydroxocobalamin 1000 mcg monthly if malabsorption
🔄 **Follow-up:** Retest B12 in 3-6 months after starting treatment
warnings: ⚠️ **Data Quality Alert:** Multiple or contradictory reports detected
🔴 **LAB_RISK_MISMATCH:** Lab shows B12=78.0 pg/mL (deficient) but previous risk was Low
📋 **Action:** Lab data takes priority - urgent review needed
🚨 **Medical Urgency:** Consult healthcare provider within 1-2 weeks
🧠 **Neurological Risk:** Untreated deficiency can cause permanent nerve damage

supplements.name: Methylcobalamin
supplements.instructions: Dissolve under tongue 30 min before breakfast
